metadata.title: India AI Development Dashboard
metadata.amountPolicy: INR crore and USD million values are charted separately. Undisclosed, per-unit, and non-row-specific amounts are preserved in the ledger but excluded from value totals.

records.initiative: Budget allocation for AI exposure, data analysis and exchange programmes in government schools.
records.investmentDomain: AI exposure and data-analysis learning in government schools.
records.technologyUse: AI-focused school programmes, data-analysis learning and AI-assisted assessment/exam processes.
records.sourceSummary: Budget-speech coverage verifies Delhi school AI exposure and data-analysis programme allocation.

records.initiative: Phase-wise advanced CCTV network for women's safety and dark spots, including ANPR cameras.
records.investmentDomain: Women's-safety surveillance and ANPR-enabled urban security.
records.investmentBrought: Around ₹646.41 crore; ₹100 crore budget allocation announced initially
records.technologyUse: IP CCTV network, ANPR cameras, central feed, dashboard and incident-management module.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India report verifies Delhi government/PWD ANPR CCTV safety network plan and budget-linked rollout.

records.initiative: Two AI Centres of Excellence at NSUT and GGSIPU under the IndiaAI Mission model.
records.investmentDomain: AI startup incubation, workforce training and governance solutions through university CoEs.
records.technologyUse: University AI CoEs for startups, training, public-service delivery and governance solutions.
records.sourceSummary: Hindustan Times report verifies two Delhi AI Centres of Excellence and their funding model.

records.organization: Delhi Police / Ministry of Home Affairs
records.initiative: Modern C4I system under the Delhi Safe City Project.
records.investmentDomain: Public-safety surveillance, camera integration and police command-control.
records.technologyUse: AI-powered surveillance network, camera integration and command-control systems.
records.sourceSummary: PIB/MHA release verifies Delhi Safe City C4I system cost and implementation.

records.organization: Anant Raj Limited + Government of Haryana
records.initiative: MoU signed with Haryana government for large-scale data-centre infrastructure across the state.
records.investmentDomain: Large-scale data centres, data storage, and digital processing infrastructure across Haryana.
records.technologyUse: AI-ready data-centre and digital infrastructure supporting cloud, data storage, and enterprise compute demand.
records.sourceSummary: Economic Times verifies Anant Raj's Haryana MoU and ₹20,000 crore data-centre plan.

records.initiative: IT/ITeS, AI and Emerging Technologies Policy; Global AI Centre and advanced computing facility.
records.investmentDomain: AI Centres of Excellence, advanced computing/skilling infrastructure and emerging-tech adoption.
records.investmentBrought: Policy package within broader state industrial push; specific AI outlay not separately published in accessible source
records.technologyUse: AI, blockchain, cybersecurity, cloud services, IoT, advanced technology training and CoEs.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India report verifies Haryana AI/emerging-tech policy components; no separate AI outlay was published.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the accessible source does not publish a separate AI outlay.

records.initiative: New Haryana Data Centre Policy 2026 for data centres and digital infrastructure.
records.investmentDomain: AI-enabling data centres, cloud computing and digital infrastructure.
records.investmentBrought: ₹10,000 crore investment target over five years
records.technologyUse: Data-centre and cloud infrastructure supporting AI, telecom, IT/ITeS and digital public infrastructure.
records.sourceSummary: UNI report verifies Haryana Data Centre Policy target and AI/cloud infrastructure support.

records.initiative: Haryana AI Development Programme with World Bank 70:30 funding arrangement.
records.investmentDomain: State AI capacity building, AI sandbox, startup incubation and public-sector AI use cases.
records.technologyUse: AI skilling, startup incubation, compute and datasets, AI sandbox and government use cases.
records.sourceSummary: Official Haryana CMO release verifies HAIDP programme value, funding structure and AI pillars.

records.initiative: State water-security programme with real-time digital water management system.
records.investmentDomain: Digital water monitoring, budgeting, distribution and climate-resilience systems across Haryana.
records.investmentBrought: ₹5,714 crore project value; ₹4,000 crore World Bank loan approved
records.technologyUse: Real-time digital water management system, water budgeting, treated-water reuse and irrigation monitoring.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies the Jal Sanrakshit Haryana value, World Bank funding and digital water-management system.

records.organization: Karnataka Government / Global Bidadi IT and AI Township
records.initiative: Bidadi AI Township plan to build an IT and AI-focused work-live-play city near Bengaluru.
records.investmentDomain: AI township, IT infrastructure, connectivity and technology-led employment ecosystem.
records.investmentBrought: Financial amount not disclosed in accessible source
records.technologyUse: IT and AI-focused township intended to attract investments, create jobs and strengthen Karnataka's AI infrastructure.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India explainer verifies the Global Bidadi IT and AI Township scope, location and state-led AI-city objective.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the financial amount is undisclosed.

records.initiative: Centre for Applied AI for Tech Solutions at Keonics HSR Layout.
records.investmentDomain: AI, robotics, automation, Industry 4.0, digital transformation and startup/industry collaboration.
records.technologyUse: Applied AI centre for startups, prototypes, industry partnerships, IP creation and professional training.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies CATS location, partners, funding split and AI/automation focus.

records.organization: Karnataka Cabinet / Institute of Bioinformatics and Applied Biotechnology
records.initiative: Centre of Excellence for AI in biotechnology approved at Electronics City.
records.investmentDomain: AI in biotechnology research, life-sciences innovation and applied bioinformatics.
records.technologyUse: AI-biotech research centre supporting life-sciences innovation and technology ecosystem capacity.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies Karnataka cabinet approval, location and ₹20 crore AI-biotech CoE outlay.

records.initiative: New data-centre campus near Bengaluru international airport.
records.investmentDomain: Data-centre campus, cloud infrastructure and AI-ready enterprise compute capacity.
records.technologyUse: Three-building data-centre campus supporting cloud, enterprise compute and AI workloads.
records.sourceSummary: Economic Times verifies NTT DATA's ₹2,400 crore Bengaluru data-centre campus investment.

records.initiative: Bagmane IT infrastructure project cleared under Karnataka industrial approvals.
records.investmentDomain: IT infrastructure, industrial land development and employment generation.
records.technologyUse: IT infrastructure project supporting Karnataka's technology and employment base.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies Karnataka's industrial approvals and Bagmane's ₹494.6 crore IT infrastructure project.

records.initiative: Industrial project approvals spanning ESDM, aerospace and advanced manufacturing.
records.investmentDomain: Electronics system design and manufacturing, aerospace technology and engineering capacity.
records.technologyUse: Technology manufacturing and aerospace/ESDM projects expected to strengthen Karnataka's advanced-tech base and jobs.
records.sourceSummary: Economic Times verifies Karnataka's ₹7,506 crore approvals and names Kaynes and Bellatrix among key investors.

records.initiative: Bengaluru-based Axiscades Aerospace investment plan in Karnataka.
records.investmentDomain: Aerospace, defence engineering and advanced manufacturing capability in Karnataka.
records.technologyUse: Aerospace and defence technology capacity expected to boost manufacturing, jobs and innovation in Karnataka.
records.sourceSummary: Economic Times verifies Axiscades Aerospace's ₹6,000 crore Karnataka investment plan as stated by the industries minister.

records.initiative: Selected for funding and strategic support under Maha Agri-AI Policy.
records.investmentDomain: AI, GenAI and frontier digital technologies for agriculture across Maharashtra.
records.technologyUse: AI and GenAI for crop intelligence, farmer support, agricultural data and digital transformation.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies Maharashtra's selection of Findability Sciences for funding and support under Maha Agri-AI.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the financial amount is undisclosed.

records.initiative: AI Startup Fund under the state AI policy.
records.investmentDomain: AI startup financing and innovation ecosystem support.
records.technologyUse: Startup financing, AI CoEs, innovation cities, incubators and GPU compute ecosystem support.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India report verifies the Maharashtra AI Startup Fund and ecosystem support under the state AI policy.

records.organization: Maharashtra Government / Department of Electronics, IT & AI
records.initiative: State AI Policy roadmap for AI industry development by 2030-31.
records.investmentDomain: Statewide AI industry development, AI CoEs, innovation cities, incubators and shared compute.
records.technologyUse: AI CoEs, AI Innovation Cities, incubators, government AI use cases, GPUs and statewide ecosystem building.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies Maharashtra's AI policy investment target and AI infrastructure components.

records.organization: Maharashtra Government / Department of Electronics, IT & AI
records.initiative: Fixed-capital investment incentive for AI units under the state AI policy.
records.investmentDomain: Capital subsidies for AI units and AI-enabled sector investment.
records.investmentBrought: Up to 20% capital subsidy; total allocation limit ₹2,000 crore
records.technologyUse: Capital subsidy, stamp-duty exemption and power-duty support for AI units.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies Maharashtra AI policy subsidy cap and incentives for AI units.

records.organization: Tillman Global Holdings + Government of Maharashtra
records.initiative: MoU for a 1GW data-centre project in Maharashtra.
records.investmentDomain: Large-scale data-centre capacity, sovereign cloud infrastructure and AI-ready digital infrastructure.
records.technologyUse: AI-ready hyperscale data-centre infrastructure supporting cloud, sovereign data and AI workloads.
records.sourceSummary: Economic Times verifies Tillman's Maharashtra MoU and up to ₹60,000 crore 1GW data-centre investment plan.

records.initiative: MoU to establish an AI Global Capability Center hub in Mumbai's BKC.
records.investmentDomain: Agentic AI R&D hub, enterprise AI operations, safe deployment and local talent ecosystem.
records.technologyUse: AI GCC hub intended to attract enterprise investment, support AI R&D and create high-tech jobs in Mumbai.
records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies Maharashtra-Supervity AI MoU for the AI GCC hub in BKC.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the financial amount is undisclosed.

records.initiative: MoU for logistics-industrial park at Kharbav-Bhiwandi and Fintech-Insurtech hub at Wadala.

amount.parseNote: Parsed USD billion amount as USD million.

records.initiative: MoU for global business districts, data centres and mixed-use developments across MMR.

records.technologyUse: Data centres and GCC districts expected to strengthen MMR's digital business and employment base.

amount.parseNote: Parsed USD billion amount as USD million.

records.initiative: Technical knowledge partnership for AI governance and smart metropolitan development.

records.sourceSummary: Times of India verifies MMRDA's Davos technical partnership with The Alan Turing Institute for AI governance.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the financial amount is undisclosed.

records.technologyUse: Data-centre and cloud interconnection infrastructure supporting AI, enterprise compute and digital workloads.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the row-specific share is not disclosed.

records.initiative: IFC commitment to support next-generation data centres, including Navi Mumbai.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the row-specific share is not disclosed.

amount.parseNote: Computed sum of explicit INR crore amounts.

records.organization: Municipal Corporation of Gurugram + Municipal Corporation of Manesar
records.initiative: AI deployment for property-tax collection and resident outreach.

amount.parseNote: Excluded because the amount is a reported collection, not an investment commitment.
